underlying_goal: Categorize Slack channel issues, then design and plan a system to automatically fetch and store daily Slack summaries in a SQLite database
friction_detail: Claude misinterpreted Q3/Q4 answers requiring user correction, and placed spec docs in wrong directory against user's preference.
brief_summary: User wanted to categorize Slack issues and design an automated daily digest system; design spec was produced but session ended before implementation, with some miscommunication along the way.
